ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
Language: java
OpenAPI Generator allows generation of API client libraries (SDK generation), server stubs, documentation and configuration automatically given an OpenAPI Spec (v2, v3)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OtterMind/Chat2DB
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OtterMind/Chat2DB
Language: java
🔥🔥🔥 AI-driven database tool and SQL client, The hottest GUI client, supporting MySQL, Oracle, PostgreSQL, DB2, SQL Server, DB2, SQLite, H2, ClickHouse, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Stirling-Tools/Stirling-PDF
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Stirling-Tools/Stirling-PDF
Language: java
#1 PDF Application on GitHub that lets you edit PDFs on any device anywhere

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TheAlgorithms/Java
Language: java
All Algorithms implemented in Java

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope-java
Language: java
Build distributed, production-grade, long-running agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/dubbo

URL: https://github.com/apache/dubbo
Language: java
The java implementation of Apache Dubbo. An RPC and microservice framework.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/gravitino

URL: https://github.com/apache/gravitino
Language: java
World's most powerful open data catalog for building a high-performance, geo-distributed and federated metadata lake.

URL: https://github.com/apache/maven
Language: java

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/paimon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/paimon
Language: java
Apache Paimon is a lake format that enables building a Realtime Lakehouse Architecture with Flink and Spark for both streaming and batch operations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: awsdocs/aws-doc-sdk-examples
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/awsdocs/aws-doc-sdk-examples
Language: java
Welcome to the AWS Code Examples Repository. This repo contains code examples used in the AWS documentation, AWS SDK Developer Guides, and more. For more information, see the Readme.md file below.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cryptomator/cryptomator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cryptomator/cryptomator
Language: java
Cryptomator for Windows, macOS, and Linux: Secure client-side encryption for your cloud storage, ensuring privacy and control over your data.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/gson
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/gson
Language: java
A Java serialization/deserialization library to convert Java Objects into JSON and back
